scope: Review confirmed completed I group matches from the night of 2026-06-16 Asia/Shanghai.

evaluation.score_error_note: France late-game scoring and elite finishing were underweighted.
Norway conversion, set-piece/aerial pressure, and game-state expansion were underweighted; Iraq scoring path was also underweighted.

aggregate_evaluation.primary_calibration_lesson: After recent draw-heavy groups, the model correctly retained favorite win direction here but became too conservative on score margin for teams with elite finishers and late-game attacking depth.

next_round_model_rules: Do not overcorrect all favorites downward because of prior draw-heavy samples.
When favorite has elite finisher plus service creator, keep 3-goal team total paths alive.
If underdog concedes first, increase collapse-risk and also preserve one-goal response paths through set pieces or target forwards.
Separate low-block resilience before first concession from resilience after chasing the game.
